name: SCC_LinkStatusChangeInd
title: SCC_LinkStatusChangeInd
syntax: void SCC_LinkStatusChangeInd ( dword OldStatus, dword NewStatus )
description: The callback is called each time the internally stored link status changes by means of link status polling.

parameters.name: OldStatus
parameters.description: Previous link status (0 = no link, 1 = link, 2 = unkown)
